name: ai-project-kickoff
description: Kick off a new AI project: run a structured requirements-gathering exercise, then generate the Proof-of-Concept documentation package to the Tecman standard, adhering to the industry standards and best practices in the bundled reference. Includes a /new-ai-project command, the ai-poc-docs skill, and a design-reviewer agent. Pairs with the tecman-docx plugin for formatting.
